mapper.select: SELECT * FROM delivery_task ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM delivery_task WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM delivery_task WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE delivery_task SET itinerary = #{itinerary}, mileage = #{mileage}, time = #{time}, energy = #{energy}, status = #{status}, create_time = #{createTime}, start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, start_addr = #{startAddr}, end_addr = #{endAddr}, user_id = #{userId} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE delivery_task SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM delivery_task WHERE id IN
#{id}
